title: Fix Help Icon Opening Unintended New Window
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the help icon to display its popup without opening a new browser window, so that I can access help content inline without being redirected away from my current page.
description:
Clicking the help icon was incorrectly opening a new browser window in addition to displaying the help popup. The expected behavior is for the help popup to appear inline within the current page without spawning a separate window.

The fix corrected the click handler to prevent the default new-window behavior while still rendering the help popup overlay.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking the help icon displays the help popup within the current page
No new browser window or tab is opened when the help icon is clicked
Help popup content loads and displays correctly after the fix
ux_changes: Corrected the help icon click behavior so the popup renders inline without opening a new browser window.
implementation_notes: Fix was applied to the help icon click handler to prevent unintended new-window behavior. Deployed to staging and verified.
comment_summary: Developer pushed a fix to staging. Reporter confirmed the fix and encouraged continued iteration on quality.
